subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! God willing, through divine grace mayest thou be enabled to attain His infinite bounties. How many [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی انشاء الله از عنایت الهی بفیوضات نامتناهیه فائز شوی چه بسیار از
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @presence of; reunion with God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
